texto: Generally by the time you are Real most of your hair has been loved off and your eyes drop out and you get loose in the joints and very shabby. But these things don't matter at all because once you are Real you can't be ugly except to people who don't understand.
explicacao: Citação de Margery Williams sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Generally by the time you are Real most of your hair has been loved off and your eyes drop out an…” articula amor, true, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.
